title: Beille 6pc Bamboo Wooden Cooking Utensil Set with Holder, Nonstick Safe Kitchen
description:
Bring function, utility and classic style to any kitchen with this bamboo wooden cooking utensil set with holder from Beille. Designed for everyday cooking, this six piece set includes essential wooden cooking utensils that make stirring, serving and meal prep effortless, while keeping your countertop organized and clutter free.

The set includes five kitchen tools: a solid bamboo spatula, two solid bamboo cooking spoons, and two slotted bamboo cooking spoons, along with a matching bamboo utensil holder for convenient storage and easy access. Crafted from durable, renewable bamboo, these wooden cooking utensils are non scratch and safe for nonstick cookware, making them ideal for everyday stove top use. The non scratch surface is safe for use with nonstick cookware, helping protect your pots and pans while cooking.

The clean, classic design pairs seamlessly with a wide range of kitchen styles, from modern farmhouse to minimalist spaces, making it a versatile addition to any home. The included holder keeps utensils upright, visible and always within reach for efficient cooking.

These wooden cooking utensils are safe for nonstick cookware and help prevent scratches while offering lightweight control for stirring, serving, sautéing, and every day cooking. This set is dishwasher safe for easy cleanup, though hand washing is highly recommended to help preserve the natural finish and extend the life of kitchen utensils over time.
short_description: Bring function, utility and classic style to any kitchen with this bamboo wooden cooking utensil set with holder from Beille. The set includes five kitchen tools: a solid bamboo spatula, two solid bamboo cooking spoons, and two slotted bamboo cooking spoons, along with a matching bamboo utensil holder for convenient storage and easy access.
